hero.title: Ũsili wa katĩ
hero.lead: Kĩsese kĩĩ kĩ na maũvoo mataeleetw'e nĩ Ngũsĩ sya Yeova, na kĩ na ilungu iseũvĩtw'e kwondũ wa kũtavya andũ ĩũlũ wa Ũsumbĩ wa Ngai.

items: Kwĩka Motwi Maseo Ĩũlũ wa Wĩa Maũndũ asu maandĩkĩtwe mbulosuanĩ ĩsu nĩmo maeleetw'e nthĩnĩ wa mbulosua yĩtawa Ũvoo Mũseo Ũla Tũkwataa Ĩvinda Yonthe. kaati sya kwĩlilikany'a maũndũKwa w'o .

Kũlya ũmanyĩw'e maũndũ maingangĩ. Maelesyo ma kwongeleela ala me nthĩnĩ wa IATF GitHub me vo, nthĩnĩ wa Kĩsese kĩĩ, kana o kũndũ kũngĩ kw'onthe. Maũndũ ala me vo no maeleany'e, mavĩndũe, kana maalyũlwe ũndũ vaĩle nĩ kana mũndũ akwatye kĩla kĩũneenewa ĩndĩ ndakethĩwe na nzika kana kĩ na ũvoo ũte vo.
Koodi nĩ ĩvĩndũe. Kĩla ũalyũlo weekawa ũvoonĩ ũsu wĩthĩawa ũandĩkĩwe ala angĩ mavukunĩ ma w'o ma kwia mavuku (public commit). Kĩsese kya GitHubKwa w'o .

Silikalĩ ĩngĩ yoosa ũtongoi. Maũndũ ala maeleetw'e nthĩnĩ wa kaati ĩno mambaa kũandĩkwa na Kĩsese kya www.jw.org. Kĩsese kya IATF Sisya ĩsandũkũ yĩ na kyongo "Maelesyo Ĩũlũ wa Ĩvuku Yitũ". maũndũ ala maandĩkĩtwe mavukunĩ ma kũkũnĩa simũ kĩsesenĩ kya GitHub.
Mathangũ ma kũthooa na kũthoosya syĩndũ. IATF yĩkaa ũu kwa kũsiany'a mbesa ila itũmĩawa kũũngamĩa myako ĩkonetye maũndũ ma viasala, o vamwe na kumya mĩvothi ya viasala nĩ kana ĩtetheesye wĩanĩ ũsu.

Maũndũ ala maeleetw'e ngewanĩ ya Ndaviti. Comments from any coordinated review or decision live in GitHub Ũneenany'a ĩũlũ wa ĩsandũkũ ya maũvoo yĩla yĩkwatanĩlw'a view Ũneenany'a Ĩkaseti ya Mũsyaĩĩsya (Kĩswaili) Kĩsese kya IATF Kĩsese kya Indaneti kya Ngũsĩ sya Yeova

header.title: Maelesyo ĩũlũ wa kũthooa na kũthoosya syĩndũ

paragraphs: IATF ĩsũvĩaa myako ĩte ya vata mũno. Kuma mwaka wa 2022, mbesa ila itũmĩawa kũũngamĩa isese sya kũea ngewa Indanetinĩ (domain names) nitũmĩkaa kĩla ĩvinda.
Ĩvuku yĩu yĩthĩawa yĩandĩkĩtwe syĩndũ ila syatũmĩawa wĩanĩ ũsu wa myako na yĩkonetye maũndũ ma kambunĩ ya International Air Transport Association (IATF).
operatingCosts.footnote: Maelesyo ĩũlũ wa kũthooa, kũthoosya, na kũĩva syĩndũ ila syaĩle kũthoow'a, nĩmonekaa nthĩnĩ wa kaati sya kumya ũkũsĩ.

items.label: Thooa wa syĩndũ
items.value: Mĩvothi ya kũtetheesya wĩa wa kũtavany'a

items.label: Maũndũ ma kwĩmanyĩsya
items.value: Cloudflare nĩyo yaũngamĩe wĩa wa kũseũvya na kũtumbĩthya syĩndũ ta mbulosua na vitio. iatf.cc Kĩsio kĩla ũkwenda kũthamĩĩa.

items.label: Maũndũ ma kwĩmanyĩsya
items.value: Domain cost funded by mugiwarafx. Kũthokya andũ ũtũmĩĩte mbulosua yĩtawa free-tier kana low-cost infrastructure.

items.label: Thooa wa syĩndũ
items.value: Mĩvothi ya kũtetheesya wĩa wa myako ya Nyũmba sya Ũsumbĩ

items.label: Maũndũ ma kwĩmanyĩsya
items.value: Domain cost funded by mugiwarafx. Kĩtumi kya kwĩka ũu nĩ kana kambunĩ ya Hostinger nĩyatũmĩie mbulosua ya Free-Tier kana ya Low-Cost nĩ kana ĩlike Indanetinĩ.

items.label: Thooa wa syĩndũ
items.value: Mĩvothi ya kũtetheesya wĩa wa myako ya Nyũmba sya Ũsumbĩ

items.label: Maũndũ ma kwĩmanyĩsya
items.value: Domain cost funded by mugiwarafx. Kũthokya andũ ũtũmĩĩte mbulosua yĩtawa free-tier kana low-cost infrastructure.

items.label: Maũndũ ma kwĩmanyĩsya
items.value: Domain cost funded by mugiwarafx. Kũũngamĩa mĩvĩa ya kũea ngewa Indanetinĩ ũtũmĩĩte GitHub Pages.

paragraphs: Syĩndũ imwe sya ũkunĩkĩli ila syaumw'a kũndũ ta kũu syĩthĩawa syĩ sya ũsengy'a mũno.
items: Maelesyo ĩũlũ wa ũndũ ũtonya kũkomana na mũndũ ũkwenda kũtwaana kana kũtwawa.
Kaati ĩsu nĩyo yĩthĩawa yonanĩtye wendi waku maũndũnĩ ma kĩ-veva.
Adresi sya vala wĩkalaa, namba syaku sya simũ, na maũndũ angĩ mate ma lasima.
Syĩndũ syonthe ila itonya kũtuma mũndũ atũmĩa syĩndũ ta simũ kana syĩndũ ingĩ sya kwĩloela nĩ sya ũvũngũ.
Kũea ngewa Indanetinĩ kwĩ kĩvathũkany'o na kũtũmanĩa mesengyi mbuku, nũndũ kwĩka ũu kwĩkaa kwimbya maũndũ.

header.title: Maũndũ asu maandĩkĩtwe mbulosuanĩ ĩsu nĩmo maeleetye ũndũ wĩa witũ wa kũtavany'a waĩle kwĩthĩwa ũilyĩ.

paragraphs: Ethĩwa nũkwenda kũmanya ũndũ mĩvango ĩsu yĩkĩtwe, neena na ovisi wa ũvonge.
